title: Formal model not registered in model registry
description: Create a new formal model file but don't register it in the model-registry.json

mutation.content:
---- MODULE BenchOrphan ----
EXTENDS Naturals
VARIABLES x
Init == x = 0
Next == x' = x + 1
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_x
Inv == x >= 0
====
mutation.description: Create TLA+ file without registry entry

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect unregistered formal model

title: Petri net with unreachable marking
description: Create a Petri net with a place that has a valid initial marking but is unreachable

mutation.content: <?xml version="1.0"?><pnml><net id="bench" type="http://www.pnml.org/version-2009/grammar/pnmlcoremodel"><page id="p1"><place id="s1"><initialMarking><text>1</text></initialMarking></place><place id="s2"/><place id="s3"/><transition id="t1"/><arc id="a1" source="s1" target="t1"/><arc id="a2" source="t1" target="s2"/></page></net></pnml>
mutation.description: Create Petri net where s3 is unreachable

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect unreachable marking in Petri net

title: Trivially true formal invariant

title: TLA+ spec timing out at default bounds
description: Create a TLA+ spec that is correct but exceeds default model checker bounds

mutation.content:
---- MODULE BenchTimeout ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences
CONSTANTS MaxVal
VARIABLES counter, history
Init == counter = 0 /\ history = <<>>
Inc == counter < MaxVal /\ counter' = counter + 1 /\ history' = Append(history, counter)
Reset == counter = MaxVal /\ counter' = 0 /\ history' = <<>>
Next == Inc \/ Reset
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counter, history>>
Inv == Len(history) <= MaxVal
====
mutation.description: Create spec requiring large state space

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect model checker timeout and suggest bounds refinement

title: Formal model with deadlock potential
description: Create a formal model where concurrent transitions can lead to deadlock

mutation.content:
---- MODULE BenchDeadlock ----
EXTENDS Naturals
VARIABLES lockA, lockB
Init == lockA = 0 /\ lockB = 0
AcquireA == lockA = 0 /\ lockA' = 1 /\ UNCHANGED lockB
AcquireB == lockB = 0 /\ lockB' = 1 /\ UNCHANGED lockA
ReleaseA == lockA = 1 /\ lockA' = 0 /\ UNCHANGED lockB
ReleaseB == lockB = 1 /\ lockB' = 0 /\ UNCHANGED lockA
Next == AcquireA \/ AcquireB \/ ReleaseA \/ ReleaseB
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<lockA, lockB>>
NoDeadlock == ~(lockA = 1 /\ lockB = 1)
====
mutation.description: Two-lock model that can deadlock if both acquired

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect deadlock potential via FMEA or model checking
